overview:
## Discussion

Use this endpoint to fetch reports for your campaigns. See [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/ReportingCampaign] and [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/CampaignAppDetail] for [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Condition] operators and field values to filter results with a [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Selector].

See the `groupBy` parameter description in the [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/ReportingRequest] for supported values per targeting dimension.

The `orderBy` [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Selector] specifies fields to sort the records list by `ASCENDING` or `DESCENDING`. All [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/ReportingCampaign] fields are available to the `orderBy` [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Selector] except `servingStateReasons`, `app`, `app:{appName}`, and `app:{adamId}`.

### Payload example 1: Get campaign-level reports for campaigns with a Maximize Conversions bid strategy

In campaigns with a Maximize Conversions bid strategy, for filtering and ordering you can use `biddingStrategy` and `targetCpa` in a selector for conditions and ordering.

### Payload example 2: Get campaign-level reports with geo

### Payload example 3: Get campaign-level reports

### Payload example 4: Get campaign-level reports with granularity

# Get Campaign-Level Reports

**Web Service Endpoint**

Fetches reports for campaigns.

## Discussion

Use this endpoint to fetch reports for your campaigns. See [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/ReportingCampaign] and [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/CampaignAppDetail] for [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Condition] operators and field values to filter results with a [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Selector].

See the `groupBy` parameter description in the [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/ReportingRequest] for supported values per targeting dimension.

The `orderBy` [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Selector] specifies fields to sort the records list by `ASCENDING` or `DESCENDING`. All [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/ReportingCampaign] fields are available to the `orderBy` [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Selector] except `servingStateReasons`, `app`, `app:{appName}`, and `app:{adamId}`.

### Payload example 1: Get campaign-level reports for campaigns with a Maximize Conversions bid strategy

In campaigns with a Maximize Conversions bid strategy, for filtering and ordering you can use `biddingStrategy` and `targetCpa` in a selector for conditions and ordering.



### Payload example 2: Get campaign-level reports with geo



### Payload example 3: Get campaign-level reports



### Payload example 4: Get campaign-level reports with granularity



## Reports Endpoints

- **Get Ad Group-Level Reports**: Fetches reports for ad groups within a campaign.
- **Get Keyword-Level Reports**: Fetches reports for targeting keywords within a campaign.
- **Get Keyword-Level within Ad Group Reports**: Fetches reports for targeting keywords within an ad group.
- **Get Search Term-Level Reports**: Fetches reports for search terms within a campaign.
- **Get Search Term-Level within Ad Group Reports**: Fetches reports for search terms within an ad group.
- **Get Ad-Level Reports**: Fetches ad performance data within a campaign.
